raw.subject: Your Wilmington page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I love the energy behind your Caribbean and Latino food truck. The idea of bringing flavors from New York City to NC is fascinating, especially considering Wilmington's coastal charm.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might make it harder for customers to find you when they're searching online or looking for a specific dish.

I sketched a homepage idea from the great photos and updates you share on Facebook, which I think could help you showcase your menu, hours, and even some of the amazing photos you post. I included a few sections I think your customers would appreciate, like a menu hero, hours block, photo gallery, and map & directions.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/the-green-light-nyc-wilmington

If you're interested in learning more about turning this into a simple, easy-to-maintain website, I'd love to discuss a straightforward project with a flat fee for local businesses. Just reply to this email or let's schedule a quick call to get started.

Let's talk details.
